import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

let total = a.len()
mut k = 0
while k < total
  let x = match a.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let y = match b.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  println("#{x}+#{y}=#{x + y}")
  k = k + 1
end
